title: Waypoint Annotations
description: Text annotations for RMF building map waypoints, keyed by level name then waypoint name.

additionalProperties.title: Waypoint annotation
additionalProperties.description: Human-readable description of notable things at this waypoint

L1.lobby: Hotel main entrance, reception desk, high foot traffic
L1.restaurant: Dining area, busy during meal times
L1.tinybot_charger: Charging station for tinybots, corner near service corridor

L2.room_101: Guest room 101, narrow doorway, do not block
